title: HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers eviction prevention services, which may include help with current or past-due rent and utilities (like electricity, water, gas, garbage, sewer, or heating fuel), landlord support, and case management. Services depend on available funding and are not guaranteed. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Must be a current tenant who is unstably housed or at imminent risk of homelessness Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 942-2176 Main phone Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call on the first business day of the month to be put on a waitlist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, photo ID, notices, letters, or other documentation that shows unpaid bills, late payments, or additional proof of risk of homelessness AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING MATERIAL GOODS - BABY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM
